fibonacci.title: Fibonacci Number
fibonacci.description: Return the nth Fibonacci number (0-indexed). F(0)=0, F(1)=1, F(n)=F(n-1)+F(n-2)

palindrome.title: Palindrome Check
palindrome.description: Check if the given string is a palindrome (reads same forwards and backwards)

two_sum.title: Two Sum (Simplified)
two_sum.description: Given a sorted list of numbers and a target, return True if any two numbers sum to target

reverse_words.title: Reverse Words
reverse_words.description: Reverse the order of words in a sentence
